description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a robust, tactical design, featuring a predominantly green cylindrical barrel with yellow striping and metallic accents. The stock is skeletal with three large circular cutouts, likely for weight reduction and ergonomic grip, and is finished in a matte black material. The receiver area is reinforced and includes visible mechanical components, such as a loading port and a prominent trigger assembly. The fore-end is compact and appears to be constructed from metal, with a visible tube running parallel to the barrel, possibly for pump-action operation. The muzzle end is squared off, and the overall build suggests durability and functionality for urban tactical scenarios. The shotgun's surfaces show a mix of matte and slightly glossy finishes, with some wear and textural detail indicating use.
description: A tactical, green and black shotgun with a skeletal stock, metallic barrel, and visible mechanical components, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the green barrel, yellow striping, and the skeletal black stock with three circular cutouts.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, compact fore-end, and the circular profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same green barrel and skeletal stock, with additional detail on the receiver and loading port.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock, showing the three cutouts and the back of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a reinforced, robust appearance
